enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief daily vlog update covering a early-morning work commitment, helping his mom with chores including experiencing her expensive LED light therapy equipment, doing outdoor work for the rest of the day, and planning motocross ride routes for Estes Park. He mentions being tired and wanting to do more talking videos but being busy with his website.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Thinks it probably works because it hurts when held in one spot too long
Wants to do them but has been too busy grinding on his website

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, Thursday, I had to do a place at 7:15 in the morning, which is the earliest this year.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We were early and done with our lecture, so we didn't want to play.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went over to my mom's place on the way home.

claims.subject: Kyle's mom
claims.claim: She had me take stuff out of the basement and clean up.

claims.subject: Kyle's mom
claims.claim: She did a light treatment on me with tiny LED lights of different colors.

claims.subject: light treatment
claims.claim: The lights are supposed to rejuvenate your cells because that's what your cells are made out of.

claims.subject: light treatment
claims.claim: There's a big machine that costs around $10,000, which she got a couple of years ago.

claims.subject: light treatment
claims.claim: She recently got a light pen that costs about $500.

claims.subject: light pen
claims.claim: It looks like a futuristic pen with light coming out, and you put it on certain areas.

claims.subject: light pen
claims.claim: It feels like you're in Star Trek, but it hurts if you hold it in one place for too long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think the light treatment works because it hurts, so I might go with her to play with those more.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I should do a YouTube video about the light treatment.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked outside all day long after that.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Everyone wanted me to come up with some cool rides to do in their estates park, so I put together some cool motor cross rides.

claims.subject: motor cross rides
claims.claim: I made big loops and missed some trails while riding.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went back to work after riding.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm kind of tired right now and can't remember what time I went to sleep last night.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Luckily, I don't have to work very far from here—it's only about five minutes away.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Maybe I should try to do a talking video today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been really focused on grinding away at my website and haven't had time for anything else.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll try to do some talking for sure.

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Log with me, Kyle, for the 19th of June, 2013, 14, yesterday, Thursday.
I had to do a place, we had to do a place at 7.15 in the morning, which is the earliest this year.
That means we were early, we were done early, because we made it one place.
And then I went over to my mama's place, because I was on the way home, and she had me do a bunch of things.
Take stuff out of the basement, help organize the house, clean stuff up.
And then she did me this light treatment, she has these lights, these tiny little LED lights, all these different colors.
There's this big machine that you put them on, and I guess the light's supposed to rejuvenate your cells,
Because that's what your cells are made out of, or something like that.
And then she had this little pen, looked like a futuristic pen, with light comes out, that you put it on certain areas.
And it's really expensive, the big light thing was like $10,000, she got that a few years ago.
But I actually recently, she got this little pen thing, that's $500, with all these different colors.
Makes you feel like you're in Star Trek, but it like hurts if you hold it in one place for too long, so I think it works.
I should, I want to go over there and play with those more.
I should do a YouTube video about it.
And I came home and I worked outside all day long until the rest of the day.
Oh, but then I was, um, Arian wanted me to come up with some cool rides to do up near Estes Park, so.
I, uh, put together a bunch of cool motocross rides to do.
Like, big loops, putting together big loops.
And the summit trails and stuff around Colorado in here.
And that was fun.
And then went back to work and then, uh, yeah, uh, I'm kind of tired right now.
I can't remember what time I went to sleep last night, but, uh, luckily I don't have to work very far from here.
It's only like five minutes away.
Okay, um, so, that's that.
Maybe I should try to do a talking video today.
I've been, like, really, like, balls to the wall, though.
Goes to the grindstone with my website.
Just didn't have time for anything else, but I'll try.
This week, we can definitely do some talking for shizzle.
And that's about that.
Okay, peace out.
